Adaptation Technology.name: Adaptation Technology
Adaptation Technology.description: plate item Global requirements symbol text item +/- 2 Effect: Your global requirements are +2 or -2 steps, your choice in each case. effect root

Advanced Ecosystems.name: Advanced Ecosystems
Advanced Ecosystems.requirements: 1 Plant tag / 1 Animal tag / 1 Microbe tag
Advanced Ecosystems.description: Requires a plant tag, a microbe tag, and an animal tag.
Advanced Ecosystems.description_ru: Необходим символ растений, символ бактерий и символ животных.

Aerobraked Ammonia Asteroid.name: Aerobraked Ammonia Asteroid
Aerobraked Ammonia Asteroid.description: Increase your heat production 3 steps and your plant production 1 step. Add 2 microbes to ANOTHER card.
Aerobraked Ammonia Asteroid.description_ru: Положите 2 жетона бактерий на другую карту. Повысьте своё производство тепла на 3 и производство растений на 1.

Aquifer Pumping.name: Aquifer Pumping
Aquifer Pumping.description: megacredits item symbol steel item symbol symbol -> oceans item Action: Spend 8 M€ to place 1 ocean tile. STEEL MAY BE USED as if you were playing a building card. effect root

Algae.name: Algae
Algae.description: Requires 5 ocean tiles. Gain 1 plant and increase your plant production 2 steps.
Algae.description_ru: Необходимо 5 тайлов океана. Получите 1 растение и повысьте своё производство растений на 2.

ArchaeBacteria.name: ArchaeBacteria
ArchaeBacteria.description: It must be -18 C or colder. Increase your plant production 1 step.
ArchaeBacteria.description_ru: Температура должна быть -18 градусов или ниже. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1.

Arctic Algae.name: Arctic Algae
Arctic Algae.description: It must be -12 C or colder to play. Gain 1 plant.
Arctic Algae.description_ru: Температура должна быть -12 градусов или ниже. Получите 1 растение.

Artificial Lake.name: Artificial Lake
Artificial Lake.description: Requires -6 C or warmer. Place 1 ocean tile ON AN AREA NOT RESERVED FOR OCEAN.
Artificial Lake.description_ru: Температура должна быть -6 градусов или выше. Выложите тайл океана на участок, не зарезервированный для океана.

Artificial Photosynthesis.name: Artificial Photosynthesis
Artificial Photosynthesis.description: Increase your plant production 1 step or your energy production 2 steps.
Artificial Photosynthesis.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство растений на 1 или своё производство энергии на 2.

Asteroid.name: Asteroid
Asteroid.description: Raise temperature 1 step and gain 2 titanium. Remove up to 3 plants from any player.
Asteroid.description_ru: Повысьте температуру на 1 и получите 2 титана. Удалите до 3 растений у любого игрока.

Beam From A Thorium Asteroid.name: Beam From A Thorium Asteroid
Beam From A Thorium Asteroid.description: Requires a Jovian tag. Increase your heat production and energy production 3 steps each.
Beam From A Thorium Asteroid.description_ru: Необходим символ Юпитера. Повысьте своё производство тепла и своё производство энергии на 3.

Big Asteroid.name: Big Asteroid
Big Asteroid.description: Raise temperature 2 steps and gain 4 titanium. Remove up to 4 plants from any player.
Big Asteroid.description_ru: Повысьте температуру на 2 и получите 4 титана. Удалите до 4 растений у любого игрока.

Biomass Combustors.name: Biomass Combustors
Biomass Combustors.description: Requires 6% oxygen. Decrease any plant production 1 step and increase your energy production 2 steps.
Biomass Combustors.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 6%. Снизьте производство растений у любого игрока на 1 и повысьте своё производство энергии на 2.

Birds.name: Birds
Birds.description: Requires 13% oxygen. Decrease any plant production 2 steps. 1 VP per animal on this card.
Birds.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 13%. Снизьте у любого игрока производство растений на 2. 1 ПО за каждый жетон животных на этой карте.

Black Polar Dust.name: Black Polar Dust
Black Polar Dust.description: Place an ocean tile. Decrease your M€ production 2 steps and increase your heat production 3 steps.
Black Polar Dust.description_ru: Выложите тайл океана. Снизьте свой доход на 2 и повысьте своё производство тепла на 3.

Bushes.name: Bushes
Bushes.description: Requires -10 C or warmer. Increase your plant production 2 steps. Gain 2 plants.
Bushes.description_ru: Температура должна быть -10 градусов или выше. Повысьте своё производство растений на 2 и получите 2 растения.

Capital.name: Capital
Capital.description: Requires 4 ocean tiles. Place this tile. Decrease your energy production 2 steps and increase your M€ production 5 steps. left

Carbonate Processing.name: Carbonate Processing
Carbonate Processing.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your heat production 3 steps.
Carbonate Processing.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство энергии на 1 и повысьте своё производство тепла на 3.

Cloud Seeding.name: Cloud Seeding
Cloud Seeding.description: Requires 3 ocean tiles. Decrease your M€ production 1 step and any heat production 1 step. Increase your plant production 2 steps.
Cloud Seeding.description_ru: Необходимо 3 тайла океана. Снизьте свой доход на 1 и производство тепла любого игрока на 1. Повысьте своё производство растений на 2.

Colonizer Training Camp.name: Colonizer Training Camp
Colonizer Training Camp.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 5% или ниже.

Comet.name: Comet
Comet.description: Raise temperature 1 step and place an ocean tile. Remove up to 3 plants from any player.
Comet.description_ru: Повысьте температуру на 1 и выложите тайл океана. Удалите до 3 растений у любого игрока.

Convoy From Europa.name: Convoy From Europa
Convoy From Europa.description: Place 1 ocean tile and draw 1 card.
Convoy From Europa.description_ru: Выложите 1 тайл океана и возьмите 1 карту.

Cupola City.name: Cupola City
Cupola City.description: Oxygen must be 9% or less. Place a city tile. Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your M€ production 3 steps.
Cupola City.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 9% или ниже. Постройте город. Снизьте своё производство энергии на 1 и повысьте свой доход на 3.

Deep Well Heating.name: Deep Well Heating
Deep Well Heating.description: Increase your energy production 1 step. Increase temperature 1 step.
Deep Well Heating.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство энергии на 1. Повысьте температуру на 1.

Deimos Down.name: Deimos Down
Deimos Down.description: Raise temperature 3 steps and gain 4 steel. Remove up to 8 plants from any player.
Deimos Down.description_ru: Повысьте температуру на 3 и получите 4 стали. Удалите до 8 растений у любого игрока.

Designed Microorganisms.name: Designed Microorganisms
Designed Microorganisms.description: It must be -14 C or colder. Increase your plant production 2 steps.
Designed Microorganisms.description_ru: Температура должна быть -14 или ниже. Повысьте своё производство растений на 2.

Domed Crater.name: Domed Crater
Domed Crater.description: Oxygen must be 7% or less. Gain 3 plants. Place a city tile. Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your M€ production 3 steps. left

Ecological Zone.name: Ecological Zone
Ecological Zone.description: Requires that YOU have a greenery tile. Place this tile adjacent to ANY greenery. left

Energy Saving.name: Energy Saving
Energy Saving.description: Increase your energy production 1 step for each city tile in play.
Energy Saving.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство энергии на 1 за каждый город в игре.

Eos Chasma National Park.name: Eos Chasma National Park
Eos Chasma National Park.description: Requires -12 C or warmer. Add 1 animal TO ANY ANIMAL CARD. Gain 3 plants. Increase your M€ production 2 steps.
Eos Chasma National Park.description_ru: Температура должна быть -12 градусов или выше. Положите 1 жетон животных на любую карту с символом животных. Получите 3 растения. Повысьте свой доход на 2.

Equatorial Magnetizer.name: Equatorial Magnetizer
Equatorial Magnetizer.description: energy item production-box symbol -> tr item Action: Decrease your energy production 1 step to increase your terraform rating 1 step. effect root

Extreme-Cold Fungus.name: Extreme-Cold Fungus
Extreme-Cold Fungus.description: It must be -10 C or colder.
Extreme-Cold Fungus.description_ru: Температура должна быть -10 градусов или ниже.

Farming.name: Farming
Farming.description: Requires +4° C or warmer. Increase your M€ production 2 steps and your plant production 2 steps. Gain 2 plants.
Farming.description_ru: Температура должна быть +4 градуса или выше. Повысьте свой доход на 2 и своё производство растений на 2. Получите 2 растения.

Fish.name: Fish
Fish.description: Requires +2 C° or warmer. Decrease any plant production 1 step. left

Flooding.name: Flooding
Flooding.description: Place an ocean tile. IF THERE ARE TILES ADJACENT TO THIS OCEAN TILE, YOU MAY REMOVE 4 M€ FROM THE OWNER OF ONE OF THOSE TILES.
Flooding.description_ru: Выложите тайл океана. Если рядом с этим тайлом есть другие тайлы, вы можете удалить 4M€ у владельца одного из тайлов.

Food Factory.name: Food Factory
Food Factory.description: Decrease your plant production 1 step and increase your M€ production 4 steps.
Food Factory.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство растений на 1 и повысьте свой доход на 4.

Fusion Power.name: Fusion Power
Fusion Power.description: Requires 2 power tags. Increase your energy production 3 steps.
Fusion Power.description_ru: Необходимо 2 символа энергии. Повысьте своё производство энергии на 3.

Fueled Generators.name: Fueled Generators
Fueled Generators.description: Decrease your M€ production 1 step and increase your energy production 1 steps.
Fueled Generators.description_ru: Снизьте свой доход на 1 и повысьте производство энергии на 1.

Ganymede Colony.name: Ganymede Colony
Ganymede Colony.description: Place a city tile ON THE RESERVED AREA.

GHG Factories.name: GHG Factories
GHG Factories.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your heat production 4 steps.
GHG Factories.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство энергии на 1 и повысьте своё производство тепла на 4.

Giant Ice Asteroid.name: Giant Ice Asteroid
Giant Ice Asteroid.description: Raise temperature 2 steps and place 2 ocean tiles. Remove up to 6 plants from any player.
Giant Ice Asteroid.description_ru: Повысьте температуру на 2 и выложите 2 тайла океана. Удалите до 6 растений у любого игрока.

Grass.name: Grass
Grass.description: Requires -16° C or warmer. Increase your plant production 1 step. Gain 3 plants.
Grass.description_ru: Температура должна быть -16 градусов или выше. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1 и получите 3 растения.

Great Dam.name: Great Dam
Great Dam.description: Requires 4 ocean tiles. Increase your energy production 2 steps.
Great Dam.description_ru: Необходимо 4 тайла океана. Повысьте своё производство энергии на 2.

Greenhouses.name: Greenhouses
Greenhouses.description: Gain 1 plant for each city tile in play.
Greenhouses.description_ru: Получите 1 растение за каждый построенный город в игре.

Heather.name: Heather
Heather.description: Requires -14 C° or warmer. Increase your plant production 1 step. Gain 1 plant.
Heather.description_ru: Температура должна быть -14 градусов или выше. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1 и получите 1 растение.

Heat Trappers.name: Heat Trappers
Heat Trappers.description: Decrease any heat production 2 steps and increase your energy production 1 step.
Heat Trappers.description_ru: Снизьте производство тепла у любого игрока на 2 и повысьте своё производство энергии на 1.

Herbivores.name: Herbivores
Herbivores.description: Requires 8% oxygen. +1 animal to this card. -1 any plant production left

Ice Cap Melting.name: Ice Cap Melting
Ice Cap Melting.description: Requires +2 C or warmer. Place 1 ocean tile.
Ice Cap Melting.description_ru: Температура должна быть +2 или выше. Выложите 1 тайл океана.

Immigrant City.name: Immigrant City
Immigrant City.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step and decrease your M€ production 2 steps. Place a city tile.
Immigrant City.description_ru: Снизьте ваше производство энергии на 1, а доход – на 2. Постройте город.

Imported GHG.name: Imported GHG
Imported GHG.description: Increase your heat production 1 step and gain 3 heat.
Imported GHG.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство тепла на 1 и получите 3 тепла.

Imported Hydrogen.name: Imported Hydrogen
Imported Hydrogen.description: Gain 3 plants, or add 3 microbes or 2 animals to ANOTHER card. Place an ocean tile.
Imported Hydrogen.description_ru: Получите 3 растения или же положите 3 жетона бактерий или 2 жетона животных на другую карту. Выложите тайл океана.

Imported Nitrogen.name: Imported Nitrogen
Imported Nitrogen.description: Raise your TR 1 step and gain 4 plants. Add 3 microbes to ANOTHER card and 2 animals to ANOTHER card.
Imported Nitrogen.description_ru: Повысьте свой рейтинг на 1 и получите 4 растения. Добавьте 3 жетона бактерий на другую карту и 2 жетона животных на другую карту.

Industrial Microbes.name: Industrial Microbes
Industrial Microbes.description: Increase your energy production and your steel production 1 step each.
Industrial Microbes.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство энергии и производство стали на 1.

Insects.name: Insects
Insects.description: Requires 6% oxygen. Increase your plant production 1 step for each plant tag you have.
Insects.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 6%. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1 за каждый ваш символ растений.

Insulation.name: Insulation
Insulation.description: Decrease your heat production any number of steps and increase your M€ production the same number of steps.
Insulation.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство тепла на любое число и на столько же повысьте свой доход.

Ironworks.name: Ironworks
Ironworks.description: energy item symbol -> steel item oxygen item Action: Spend 4 energy to gain 1 steel and raise oxygen 1 step. effect root

Kelp Farming.name: Kelp Farming
Kelp Farming.description: Requires 6 ocean tiles. Increase your M€ production 2 steps and your plant production 3 steps. Gain 2 plants.
Kelp Farming.description_ru: Необходимо 6 тайлов океана. Получите 2 растения, повысьте своё производство растений на 3, а свой доход на 2.

Lake Marineris.name: Lake Marineris
Lake Marineris.description: Requires 0° C or warmer. Place 2 ocean tiles.
Lake Marineris.description_ru: Температура должна быть 0°C или выше. Выложите 2 тайла океана.

Large Convoy.name: Large Convoy
Large Convoy.description: Place an ocean tile and draw 2 cards. Gain 5 plants or add 4 animals to ANOTHER card.
Large Convoy.description_ru: Выложите тайл океана и возьмите 2 карты. Получите 5 растений или положите 4 жетона животных на другую карту.

Lava Flows.name: Lava Flows
Lava Flows.description: Raise temperature 2 steps and place this tile ON EITHER THARSIS THOLUS, ASCRAEUS MONS, PAVONIS MONS OR ARSIA MONS.
Lava Flows.description_ru: Повысьте температуру на 2 и выложите этот тайл либо на купол Фарсида, либо на гору Павлина, либо на гору Арсия.

Lichen.name: Lichen
Lichen.description: Requires -24 C or warmer. Increase your plant production 1 step.
Lichen.description_ru: Температура должна быть -24 или выше. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1.

Livestock.name: Livestock
Livestock.description: Requires 9% oxygen. Decrease your plant production 1 step and increase your M€ production 2 steps left

Local Heat Trapping.name: Local Heat Trapping
Local Heat Trapping.description: Spend 5 heat to gain either 4 plants, or to add 2 animals to ANOTHER card.
Local Heat Trapping.description_ru: Потратьте 5 тепла и получите 4 растения или положите 2 жетона животных на другую карту.

Lunar Beam.name: Lunar Beam
Lunar Beam.description: Decrease your M€ production 2 steps and increase your heat production and energy production 2 steps each.
Lunar Beam.description_ru: Снизьте свой доход на 2 и повысьте своё производство тепла и производство энергии на 2.

Magnetic Field Dome.name: Magnetic Field Dome
Magnetic Field Dome.description: Decrease your energy production 2 steps and increase your plant production 1 step. Raise your TR 1 step.
Magnetic Field Dome.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство энергии на 2 и повысьте своё производство растений на 1. Повысьте свой рейтинг на 1.

Magnetic Field Generators.name: Magnetic Field Generators
Magnetic Field Generators.description: Decrease your energy production 4 steps and increase your plant production 2 steps. Raise your TR 3 steps.
Magnetic Field Generators.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство энергии на 4 и повысьте своё производство растений на 2. Повысьте свой рейтинг на 3.

Mangrove.name: Mangrove
Mangrove.description: Requires +4 C or warmer. Place a greenery tile ON AN AREA RESERVED FOR OCEAN and raise oxygen 1 step. Disregard normal placement restrictions for this.
Mangrove.description_ru: Температура должна быть +4 градуса или выше. Проведите озеленение на зарезервированном для океана участке, игнорируя правила проведения озеленения, и повысьте уровень кислорода на 1.

Martian Rails.name: Martian Rails
Martian Rails.description: energy item symbol -> megacredits item symbol city item symbol Action: Spend 1 energy to gain 1 M€ for each city tile ON MARS. effect root

Methane From Titan.name: Methane From Titan
Methane From Titan.description: Requires 2% oxygen. Increase your heat production 2 steps and your plant production 2 steps.
Methane From Titan.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 2%. Повысьте своё производство тепла на 2 и производство растений на 2.

Mining Expedition.name: Mining Expedition
Mining Expedition.description: Raise oxygen 1 step. Remove 2 plants from any player. Gain 2 steel.
Mining Expedition.description_ru: Повысьте уровень кислорода на 1. Удалите 2 растения у любого игрока, получите 2 стали.

Mining Rights.name: Mining Rights
Mining Rights.description: Place this tile on an area with a steel or titanium placement bonus. Increase that production 1 step.
Mining Rights.description_ru: Выложите этот тайл на участок, где титан или сталь являются бонусом за размещение тайла. Повысьте производство стали или титана на 1.

Mohole Area.name: Mohole Area
Mohole Area.description: Increase your heat production 4 steps. Place this tile ON AN AREA RESERVED FOR OCEAN.
Mohole Area.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство тепла на 4. Выложите этот тайл на зарезервированный для океана участок.

Moss.name: Moss
Moss.description: Requires 3 ocean tiles and that you lose 1 plant. Increase your plant production 1 step.
Moss.description_ru: Необходимо 3 тайла океана и потерять 1 растение. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1.

Natural Preserve.name: Natural Preserve
Natural Preserve.description: Oxygen must be 4% or less. Place this tile NEXT TO NO OTHER TILE. Increase your M€ production 1 step.
Natural Preserve.description_ru: Уровень кислорода должен быть 4% или ниже. Выложите этот тайл так, чтобы он не был соседним ни с каким другим тайлом. Повысьте свой доход на 1.

Nitrite Reducing Bacteria.name: Nitrite Reducing Bacteria
Nitrite Reducing Bacteria.description_ru: Положите 3 жетона бактерий на эту карту.

Nitrogen-Rich Asteroid.name: Nitrogen-Rich Asteroid
Nitrogen-Rich Asteroid.description: Raise your terraforming rating 2 steps and temperature 1 step. Increase your plant production 1 step, or 4 steps if you have 3 plant tags.
Nitrogen-Rich Asteroid.description_ru: Повысьте свой рейтинг на 2 и температуру на 1. Повысьте своё производство растений на 1 или, если у вас есть 3 символа растений, на 4.

Nitrophilic Moss.name: Nitrophilic Moss
Nitrophilic Moss.description: Requires 3 ocean tiles and that you lose 2 plants. Increase your plant production 2 steps.
Nitrophilic Moss.description_ru: Необходимо 3 тайла океана и потерять 2 растения. Повысьте своё производство растений на 2.

Noctis City.name: Noctis City
Noctis City.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your M€ production 3 steps. Place a city tile ON THE RESERVED AREA, disregarding normal placement restrictions.
Noctis City.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство энергии на 1 и повысьте свой доход на 3. Постройте город на зарезервированном участке, независимо от стандартных требований к строительству города.

Noctis Farming.name: Noctis Farming
Noctis Farming.description: Requires -20 C or warmer. Increase your M€ production 1 step and gain 2 plants.
Noctis Farming.description_ru: Температура должна быть -20 или выше. Повысьте свой доход на 1 и получите 2 растения.

Nuclear Power.name: Nuclear Power
Nuclear Power.description: Decrease your M€ production 2 steps and increase your energy production 3 steps.
Nuclear Power.description_ru: Снизьте свой доход на 2 и повысьте своё производство энергии на 3.

Nuclear Zone.name: Nuclear Zone
Nuclear Zone.description: Place this tile and raise temperature 2 steps.
Nuclear Zone.description_ru: Выложите этот тайл и повысьте температуру на 2.

Open City.name: Open City
Open City.description: Requires 12% oxygen. Gain 2 plants. Place a city tile. Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your M€ production 4 steps. left

Optimal Aerobraking.name: Optimal Aerobraking
Optimal Aerobraking.description: tag item space tag item event symbol megacredits item heat item Effect: When you play a space event, you gain 3 M€ and 3 heat. effect root

Ore Processor.name: Ore Processor
Ore Processor.description: energy item symbol -> titanium item oxygen item Action: Spend 4 energy to gain 1 titanium and increase oxygen 1 step. effect root

Permafrost Extraction.name: Permafrost Extraction
Permafrost Extraction.description: Requires -8 C or warmer. Place 1 ocean tile.
Permafrost Extraction.description_ru: Температура должна быть -8 или выше. Выложите 1 тайл океана.

Peroxide Power.name: Peroxide Power
Peroxide Power.description: Decrease your M€ production 1 step and increase your energy production 2 steps.
Peroxide Power.description_ru: Снизьте свой доход на 1 и повысьте своё производство энергии на 2.

Pets.name: Pets
Pets.description: Add 1 animal to this card. left

Phobos Space Haven.name: Phobos Space Haven
Phobos Space Haven.description: Increase your titanium production 1 step and place a city tile ON THE RESERVED AREA.
Phobos Space Haven.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство титана на 1. Постройте город на зарезервированном участке.

Plantation.name: Plantation
Plantation.description: Requires 2 science tags. Place a greenery tile and raise oxygen 1 step.
Plantation.description_ru: Необходимо 2 символа науки. Проведите озеленение и повысьте уровень кислорода на 1.

Power Grid.name: Power Grid
Power Grid.description: Increase your energy production step for each power tag you have, including this.
Power Grid.description_ru: Повысьте своё производство энергии на 1 за каждый ваш символ энергии, включая этот.

Protected Valley.name: Protected Valley
Protected Valley.description: Increase your M€ production 2 steps. Place a greenery tile ON AN AREA RESERVED FOR OCEAN, disregarding normal placement restrictions, and increase oxygen 1 step.
Protected Valley.description_ru: Повысьте свой доход на 2. Проведите озеленение зарезервированного для океана участка, игнорируя правила проведения озеленений, и повысьте уровень кислорода на 1.

Rad-Chem Factory.name: Rad-Chem Factory
Rad-Chem Factory.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step. Raise your TR 2 steps.
Rad-Chem Factory.description_ru: Снизьте своё производство энергии на 1. Повысьте свой рейтинг на 2.

Special Permit.description_ru: Требование: Зелёные в правящий партии или 2 делегата в ней. Украдите 4 растения у любого игрока.

Floating Refinery.name: Floating Refinery
Floating Refinery.description: Add 1 floater here for each Venus tag you have.
Floating Refinery.description_ru: Добавьте 1 аэростат на эту карту за каждую вашу метку Венеры.

Frontier Town.name: Frontier Town
Frontier Town.description: Requires that Mars First is ruling or that you have 2 delegates there. Decrease your energy production one step. Place a city tile. GAIN THE PRINTED PLACEMENT BONUS 2 ADDITIONAL TIMES.
Frontier Town.description_ru: Требуется, чтобы правищей партией был Марс вперёд или чтобы у вас было 2 делегата в ней. Уменьшите своё производство энергии на 1. Разместите один тайл города. Получите бонус размещения, указанный на карте, ещё 2 раза.

Jovian Envoys.name: Jovian Envoys
Jovian Envoys.description: Requires 2 Jovian tags. Place 2 delegates in 1 party.
Jovian Envoys.description_ru: Требуется 2 метки Юпитера. Разместите 2-х делегатов в одной партии.

Microgravity Nutrition.name: Microgravity Nutrition
Microgravity Nutrition.description: Increase your M€ production 1 step for each colony you have.
Microgravity Nutrition.description_ru: Увеличьте производство М€ на 1 за каждую вашу колонию.

Soil Studies.name: Soil Studies
Soil Studies.description: Requires that temperature is -4 C or lower. Gain 1 plant per Venus tag, plant tag, and colony you have.
Soil Studies.description_ru: Требование: температура должна быть –4 °C или ниже. Получите 1 растение за каждую вашу метку Венеры, метку растений и за каждую вашу колонию.

Stratospheric Expedition.name: Stratospheric Expedition
Stratospheric Expedition.description: Add two floaters to ANY CARD. Draw 2 Venus cards.
Stratospheric Expedition.description_ru: Добавьте 2 аэростата на любую карту. Доберите 2 карты Венеры.

Unexpected Application.name: Unexpected Application
Unexpected Application.description: Discard 1 card to terraform Venus 1 step.
Unexpected Application.description_ru: Сбросьте 1 карту, чтобы повысить показатель Венеры на 1 шаг.

Venus Allies.name: Venus Allies
Venus Allies.description: Raise Venus 2 steps. Gain 4 M€ per colony you have.
Venus Allies.description_ru: Повысьте шкалу Венеры на 2 шага. Получите 4 M€ за каждую свою колонию.

Venus Orbital Survey.name: Venus Orbital Survey
Venus Orbital Survey.description: symbol symbol -> symbol effect text item Action: Reveal the top 2 cards, take any venus cards to hand for free. Any other card you either buy or discard root

Venus Shuttles.name: Venus Shuttles
Venus Shuttles.description: Add 2 floaters to ANY VENUS CARD.
Venus Shuttles.description_ru: Добавьте 2 аэростата на любую карту с меткой Венеры.

WG Project.name: WG Project
WG Project.description: Requires that you are Chairman. DRAW 3 PRELUDE CARDS AND PLAY 1 OF THEM, Discard the other 2.
WG Project.description_ru: Требуется, чтобы вы были председателем. Возьмите 3 карты Прелюдии и разыграйте 1 из них. Остальные 2 сбросьте.

Nirgal Enterprises.name: Nirgal Enterprises
Nirgal Enterprises.description: You start with 30 M€. Increase your energy, plant, and steel production 1 step each.
Nirgal Enterprises.description_ru: Вы начинаете с 30 М€. Повысьте ваше производство энергии, растений и стали на 1 шаг.

Palladin Shipping.name: Palladin Shipping
Palladin Shipping.description: You start with 36 M€. Gain 5 titanium.
Palladin Shipping.description_ru: Вы начинаете с 36 M€ и 5 титана

Sagitta Frontier Services.name: Sagitta Frontier Services
Sagitta Frontier Services.description: You start with 31 M€. Increase energy production 1 step and M€ production 2 steps. Draw a card that has no tag.
Sagitta Frontier Services.description_ru: Вы начинаете с 31 M€. Увеличьте ваше производство энергии на 1 и производство M€ на 2. Доберите карту без метки

EcoTec.name: EcoTec
EcoTec.description: You start with 42 M€. Increase your plant production 1 step.
EcoTec.description_ru: Вы начинаете с 42 M€. Увеличьте ваше производство растений на 1

Spire.name: Spire
Spire.description: megacredits item symbol cards item symbol cards item text item You start with 50 M€. As your first action, draw 4 cards, then discard 3 cards from your hand. empty_tag item symbol symbol resource item Science Effect: When you play a card with at least 2 tags. including this, add 1 science resource here. effect plate item Standard Project symbol resource item Science symbol megacredits item Effect: When you pay for a standard project, science resources here may be used as 2 M€ each. effect root

Atmospheric Enhancers.name: Atmospheric Enhancers
Atmospheric Enhancers.description: Raise temperature 2 steps, or raise oxygen 2 steps, or raise Venus 2 steps. Draw 2 cards with floater icons.
Atmospheric Enhancers.description_ru: Повысьте на 2 деления температуру или кислород или Венеру. Доберите 2 карты с аэростатами.

Board of Directors.name: Board of Directors
Board of Directors.description_ru: Добавьте на эту карту 4 ресурса директора.

Colony Trade Hub.name: Colony Trade Hub
Colony Trade Hub.description: Increase your energy production 1 step. Gain 2 titanium

Corridors of Power.name: Corridors of Power
Corridors of Power.description: party_leaders item symbol cards item Effect: Each time you become party leader, draw 1 card. effect tr item megacredits item text item Raise your TR 1 step and gain 4 M€ root

Floating Trade Hub.name: Floating Trade Hub
Floating Trade Hub.description: symbol symbol -> resource item Floater symbol Action: Add 2 floaters to ANY card. effect text item resource item Floater symbol -> text item wild item Action: Remove any number of floaters here to gain that many of one standard resource. effect root

Focused Organization.name: Focused Organization
Focused Organization.description: cards item wild item symbol -> cards item wild item Action: Discard 1 card and spend 1 standard resource to draw 1 card and gain 1 standard resource. effect cards item wild item text item Draw 1 card and gain 1 standard resource. root

High Circles.name: High Circles
High Circles.description: tr item cards item symbol delegates item text item Raise your TR 1 step and draw 1 card with PARTY REQUIREMENT. Place 2 delegates in one party. symbol symbol influence item Effect: You have +1 influence. effect root

Industrial Complex.name: Industrial Complex
Industrial Complex.description: Lose 18 M€. INCREASE ALL YOUR PRODUCTIONS THAT ARE LOWER THAN 1, TO 1.
Industrial Complex.description_ru: Сбросьте 18 М€. Повысьте все свои производства, которые ниже 1, до уровня 1.

Main Belt Asteroids.name: Main Belt Asteroids
Main Belt Asteroids.description: Lose 5 M€. 1 VP per 2 asteroids here.
Main Belt Asteroids.description_ru: Сбросьте 5 М€. 1 ПО за каждые 2 астероида на этой карте.

Nobel Prize.name: Nobel Prize
Nobel Prize.description: Gain 5 M€. Draw 2 cards with requirements.

Old Mining Colony.name: Old Mining Colony
Old Mining Colony.description: Increase your titanium production 1 step. Place 1 colony. Discard 1 card.

Planetary Alliance.name: Planetary Alliance
Planetary Alliance.description: Raise your TR 2 steps. Draw 1 Jovian card and 1 Venus card.
Planetary Alliance.description_ru: Повысьте ваш РТ на 2. Доберите 1 карту с меткой Юпитера и 1 карту с меткой Венеры.

Project Eden.name: Project Eden
Project Eden.description: Place 1 ocean tile, 1 city tile, and 1 greenery tile. Discard 3 cards.
Project Eden.description_ru: Разместите 1 океан, 1 город и 1 тайл озеленения. Сбросьте 3 карты.

Recession.name: Recession
Recession.description: EACH OPPONENT loses 5 M€ and decreases their M€ production 1 step. You gain 10 M€.
Recession.description_ru: Каждый противник теряет 5 М€ и уменьшает своё производство М€ на 1. Вы получаете 10 М€.

Rise To Power.name: Rise To Power
Rise To Power.description: Increase your M€ production 3 steps and place 3 delegates. YOU MAY PLACE THEM IN SEPARATE PARTIES.
Rise To Power.description_ru: Увеличьте своё производство М€ на 3 и разместите 3 делегата. Их можно разместить в разных партиях.

Soil Bacteria.name: Soil Bacteria
Soil Bacteria.description: Draw 2 microbe cards and gain 3 plants.
Soil Bacteria.description_ru: Доберите 2 карты с меткой микроба и получите 3 растения.

Terraforming Deal.name: Terraforming Deal
Terraforming Deal.description: tr item symbol megacredits item Effect: Each step your TR is raised, you gain 2 M€. effect root

Venus Contract.name: Venus Contract
Venus Contract.description: Draw 1 Venus card. Raise your TR 1 step.
Venus Contract.description_ru: Доберите 1 карту Венеры. Повысьте ваш РТ на 1.

World Government Advisor.name: World Government Advisor
World Government Advisor.description: Raise your TR 2 steps. Draw 1 card.

Aerial Lenses.name: Aerial Lenses
Aerial Lenses.description: Requires that Kelvinists are ruling or that you have 2 delegates there. Remove up to 2 plants from any player. Increase your heat production 2 steps.
Aerial Lenses.description_ru: Требование: Кельвинисты в правящий партии или 2 делегата в ней. Уберите до 2 растений у любого игрока. Увеличьте свое производство тепла на 2.

Banned Delegate.name: Banned Delegate
Banned Delegate.description: Requires that you are Chairman. Remove any NON-LEADER delegate.
Banned Delegate.description_ru: Требование: ваш делегат председатель. Уберите любого делегата (не лидера)

Cultural Metropolis.name: Cultural Metropolis
Cultural Metropolis.description: Requires that Unity is ruling or that you have 2 delegates there. Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your M€ production 3 steps. Place a city tile. Place 2 delegates in 1 party.
Cultural Metropolis.description_ru: Требование: Союз в правящий партии или 2 делегата в ней. Уменьшите свое производство энергии на 1 и увеличьте свое производство M€ на 3. Выложите жетон города. Добавьте 2 делегатов в одну партию

Diaspora Movement.name: Diaspora Movement
Diaspora Movement.description: Requires that Reds are ruling or that you have 2 delegates there. Gain 1M€ for each Jovian tag in play, including this.
Diaspora Movement.description_ru: Требование: Красные в правящий партии или 2 делегата в ней. Получите 1 M€ за каждую метку Юпитера, вклюячая эту

Event Analysts.name: Event Analysts
Event Analysts.description: Requires that Scientists are ruling or that you have 2 delegates there.
Event Analysts.description_ru: Требование: Ученые в правящий партии или 2 делегата в ней.

GMO Contract.name: GMO Contract
GMO Contract.description: Requires that Greens are ruling or that you have 2 delegates there.
GMO Contract.description_ru: Требование: Зелёные в правящий партии или 2 делегата в ней.

Martian Media Center.name: Martian Media Center
Martian Media Center.description: Requires that Mars First is ruling or that you have 2 delegates there. Increase your M€ production 2 steps.
Martian Media Center.description_ru: Требование: Марс вперед в правящий партии или 2 делегата в ней. Увеличте своё производство M€ на 2

Parliament Hall.name: Parliament Hall
Parliament Hall.description: Requires that Mars First are ruling or that you have 2 delegates there. Increase your M€ production 1 step for every 3 building tags you have, including this.
Parliament Hall.description_ru: Требование: Марс вперед в правящий партии или 2 делегата в ней. Увеличьте своё производство M€ на 1 за каждые 3 метки Зданий, включая эту

PR Office.name: PR Office
PR Office.description: Requires that Unity are ruling or that you have 2 delegates there. Gain 1 TR. Gain 1 M€ for each Earth tag you have, including this.
PR Office.description_ru: Требование: Союз в правящий партии или 2 делегата в ней. Получите 1 РТ. Получите 1 M€ за каждую свою метку Земли, включая эту

Political Alliance.name: Political Alliance
Political Alliance.description: Requires that you have 2 party leaders. Gain 1 TR.
Political Alliance.description_ru: Требование: у вас есть хотя бы 2 лидера партий. Увеличьте свой РТ на 1

Recruitment.name: Recruitment
Recruitment.description: Exchange one NEUTRAL NON-LEADER delegate with one of your own from the reserve.
Recruitment.description_ru: Замените 1 нейтрального делегата (не лидера) на своего из запаса

Red Tourism Wave.name: Red Tourism Wave
Red Tourism Wave.description: Requires that Reds are ruling or that you have 2 delegates there. Gain 1 M€ from each EMPTY AREA ADJACENT TO YOUR TILES
Red Tourism Wave.description_ru: Требование: Красные в правящий партии или 2 делегата в ней. Получите 1 M€ за каждую ПУСТУЮ клетку рядом с ВАШИМИ ЖЕТОНАМИ

Sponsored Mohole.name: Sponsored Mohole
Sponsored Mohole.description: Requires that Kelvinists are ruling or that you have 2 delegates there. Increase your heat production 2 steps.
Sponsored Mohole.description_ru: Кельвинисты в правящий партии или 2 делегата в ней. Увеличьте своё производство тепла на 2

Supported Research.name: Supported Research
Supported Research.description: Requires that Scientists are ruling or that you have 2 delegates there. Draw 2 cards.
Supported Research.description_ru: Требование: Учёные в правящий партии или 2 делегата в ней. Доберите 2 карты

Wildlife Dome.name: Wildlife Dome
Wildlife Dome.description: Requires that Greens are ruling or that you have 2 delegates there. Place a greenery tile and raise oxygen 1 step.
Wildlife Dome.description_ru: Требование: Зелёные в правящий партии или 2 делегата в ней. Выложите жатон озеленения

Vote Of No Confidence.name: Vote Of No Confidence
Vote Of No Confidence.description: Requires that you have a Party Leader in any party and that the sitting Chairman is neutral. Remove the NEUTRAL Chairman and move your own delegate (from the reserve) there instead. Gain 1 TR.
Vote Of No Confidence.description_ru: Требование: ваш делегат - лидер. Уберите НЕЙТРАЛЬНОГО председателя и назначьте туда своего делегата из запаса. Получите 1 РТ

Pristar.name: Pristar
Pristar.description: You start with 53 M€. Decrease your TR 2 steps. 1 VP per preservation resource here.
Pristar.description_ru: Вы начинаете с 53M€. Уменьшите свой РТ на 2. 1 ПО за каждый ресурс на этой карте

Terralabs Research.name: Terralabs Research
Terralabs Research.description: You start with 14 M€. Lower your TR 1 step.
Terralabs Research.description_ru: Вы начинаете с 14M€. Уменьшите свой РТ на 1

Utopia Invest.name: Utopia Invest
Utopia Invest.description: You start with 40 M€. Increase your steel and titanium production 1 step each.
Utopia Invest.description_ru: Вы начинаете с 40M€. Увеличьте на 1 своё производство стали и титана

Septem Tribus.name: Septem Tribus
Septem Tribus.description: You start with 36 M€. When you perform an action, the wild tag counts as any tag of your choice.
Septem Tribus.description_ru: Вы начинаете с 36 M€. В фазе действий метка на этой карте становится любой меткой на ваш выбор

Bioengineering Enclosure.name: Bioengineering Enclosure
Bioengineering Enclosure.description: Requires 1 science tag to play. Add 2 animals to this card. OTHERS MAY NOT REMOVE ANIMALS FROM THIS CARD.

Bio-Fertilizer Facility.name: Bio-Fertilizer Facility
Bio-Fertilizer Facility.description: Requires 1 science tag. Increase your plant production 1 step. Add up to 2 microbes to ANY card. Place this tile which grants an ADJACENCY BONUS of 1 plant and 1 microbe.

Butterfly Effect.name: Butterfly Effect
Butterfly Effect.description: Gain 1 TR. Move each hazard marker up to 1 step up or down along its terraforming track.

Capital:ares.name: Capital:ares
Capital:ares.description: Requires 4 ocean tiles. Place tile with ADJACENCY BONUS of 2 M€. Energy prod -2 and M€ prod +5. left

Commercial District:ares.name: Commercial District:ares
Commercial District:ares.description: Place this tile which grants an ADJACENCY BONUS of 2 M€. Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your M€ production 4 steps.

Deimos Down:ares.name: Deimos Down:ares
Deimos Down:ares.description: Raise temperature 3 steps and gain 4 steel. Place this tile ADJACENT TO no city tile. It provides adjacency bonus of 1 asteroid and 1 steel. Remove up to 6 plants from any player.

Desperate Measures.name: Desperate Measures
Desperate Measures.description: Place a bronze cube on a dust storm tile and raise oxygen 1 step, or place a bronze cube on an erosion tile and raise the temperature 1 step. The hazard tile with the bronze cube cannot be removed.

Ecological Zone:ares.name: Ecological Zone:ares
Ecological Zone:ares.description: Requires that YOU have a greenery tile. Place this tile adjacent to ANY greenery. left

Geological Survey.name: Geological Survey
Geological Survey.description: Requires 5 or fewer greeneries on Mars.

Industrial Center:ares.name: Industrial Center:ares
Industrial Center:ares.description: Place this tile adjacent to a city tile. This tile grants an ADJACENCY BONUS of 1 steel.

Great Dam:ares.name: Great Dam:ares
Great Dam:ares.description: Requires 4 ocean tiles. Increase your energy production 2 steps. Place this tile ADJACENT TO an ocean tile. The tile grants an ADJACENCY BONUS of 2 Energy.

Lava Flows:ares.name: Lava Flows:ares
Lava Flows:ares.description: Raise temperature 2 steps and place this tile ON EITHER THARSIS THOLUS, ASCRAEUS MONS, PAVONIS MONS OR ARSIA MONS. This tile grants an ADJACENCY BONUS of 2 heat.

Magnetic Field Generators:ares.name: Magnetic Field Generators:ares
Magnetic Field Generators:ares.description: Decrease your energy production 4 steps and increase your plant production 2 steps. Raise your TR 3 steps. Place this tile. It provides adjacency bonus of 1 plant and 1 microbe.

Metallic Asteroid.name: Metallic Asteroid
Metallic Asteroid.description: Raise temperature 1 step and gain 1 titanium. Remove up to 4 plants from any player. Place this tile which grants an ADJACENCY BONUS of 1 titanium.

Mining Area:ares.name: Mining Area:ares
Mining Area:ares.description: Place one of these tiles on an area with a steel or titanium placement bonus, ADJACENT TO ANOTHER OF YOUR TILES. This tile provides an ADJACENCY BONUS of the same resource as the area. Increase your production of that resource 1 step.

Mining Rights:ares.name: Mining Rights:ares
Mining Rights:ares.description: Place one of these tiles on an area with a steel or titanium placement bonus. This tile provides an ADJACENCY BONUS of the same resource as the area. Increase your production of that resource 1 step.

Mohole Area:ares.name: Mohole Area:ares
Mohole Area:ares.description: Increase your heat production 4 steps. Place this tile ON AN AREA RESERVED FOR OCEAN. The tile grants an ADJACENCY BONUS of 2 heat.

Natural Preserve:ares.name: Natural Preserve:ares
Natural Preserve:ares.description: Oxygen must be 4% or less. Place this tile NEXT TO NO OTHER TILE. The tile grants an ADJACENCY BONUS of of 1 M€. Increase your M€ production 1 step.

Nuclear Zone:ares.name: Nuclear Zone:ares
Nuclear Zone:ares.description: Raise the temperature two steps. Place this tile. Players must pay an additional 2M€ when they place a tile with their player marker on it ADJACENT to the Nuclear Zone.

Ocean City.name: Ocean City
Ocean City.description: Requires 6 ocean tiles. Decrease your energy production 1 step and increase your M€ production 3 steps. Place this tile on top of an existing ocean tile, IGNORING NORMAL PLACEMENT RESTRICTIONS FOR CITIES. The tile counts as a city as well as an ocean.

Ocean Farm.name: Ocean Farm
Ocean Farm.description: Requires 4 ocean tiles. Increase your heat production 1 step and increase your plant production 1 step. Place this tile on top of an existing ocean tile. The tile grants an ADJACENCY BONUS of 1 plant.

Ocean Sanctuary.name: Ocean Sanctuary
Ocean Sanctuary.description: Requires 5 ocean tiles. Place this tile on top of an existing ocean tile. The tile grants an ADJACENCY BONUS of 1 animal. Add 1 animal to this card.

Restricted Area:ares.name: Restricted Area:ares
Restricted Area:ares.description: Place this tile which grants an ADJACENCY BONUS of 1 card.

Solar Farm.name: Solar Farm
Solar Farm.description: Place this tile which grants an ADJACENCY BONUS of 2 energy. Increase your energy production 1 step for each plant resource on the area where you place the tile.

Geologist Team.name: Geologist Team
Geologist Team.description: symbol symbol -> identify item Action: Identify 1 underground resource. effect identify item oceans item symbol symbol tr item Effect: When ANY player identifies an underground resource that depicts an ocean, YOU gain 1 TR. effect root

Geoscan Satellite.name: Geoscan Satellite
Geoscan Satellite.description: Pick a space on the board. Identify the underground resource in that space and in all adjacent spaces. Claim one of them.

Tunnel Boring Machine.name: Tunnel Boring Machine
Tunnel Boring Machine.description: energy item symbol -> excavate item Action: Pay 3 energy to excavate 2 underground resources. effect root

Underground Railway.name: Underground Railway
Underground Railway.description: Decrease your energy production 1 step. Gain 1 TR for every 4 underground tokens you have.

Gaia City.name: Gaia City
Gaia City.description: Reduce your energy production one step and increase your plant production 2 steps. Place a city on a NON-RESERVED SPACE WITH YOUR EXCAVATION MARKER, ignoring other placement restrictions

Deepnuking.name: Deepnuking
Deepnuking.description: Excavate 2 underground resources. Remove up to 3 plants from any player.

Old World Mafia.name: Old World Mafia
Old World Mafia.description: Gain 1 corruption for every 2 Earth tags you have, including this.

Nightclubs.name: Nightclubs
Nightclubs.description: Requires that you own a city in play. Gain 1 corruption and increase your M€ production 2 steps.

Reckless Detonation.name: Reckless Detonation
Reckless Detonation.description: Requires 2 corruption. Excavate an underground resource. Remove up to 3 steel or 2 titanium from any player.

Off-World Tax Haven.name: Off-World Tax Haven
Off-World Tax Haven.description: Requires 2 corruption. Increase your M€ production 5 steps.

Subnautic Pirates.name: Subnautic Pirates
Subnautic Pirates.description: Requires you have 1 corruption and 1 underground token. Steal 7 M€ from a player that HAS A TILE NEXT TO AN OCEAN.

Fabricated Scandal.name: Fabricated Scandal
Fabricated Scandal.description: Gain 1 corruption. The players with the highest TR lose 1 TR. Then the players with the lowest TR gain 1 TR, if possible.

Subterranean Sea.name: Subterranean Sea
Subterranean Sea.description: Place an ocean tile ON AN AREA NOT RESERVED FOR OCEAN where you have an excavation marker.

Forest Tunnels.name: Forest Tunnels
Forest Tunnels.description: Gain 1 plant for each underground token you own.

Man-made Volcano.name: Man-made Volcano
Man-made Volcano.description: energy item heat item production-box text item Increase your energy production 2 steps and your heat production 4 steps. tile symbol excavate item symbol text item Place this special tile on a NON-RESERVED space that has your excavation marker. root

Tunneling Subcontractor.name: Tunneling Subcontractor
Tunneling Subcontractor.description: Gain 1 corruption. Excavate an underground resource.

Underground Amusement Park.name: Underground Amusement Park
Underground Amusement Park.description: Requires you have 1 underground token. Increase your M€ production 1 step.

Casino.name: Casino
Casino.description: Requires that you own 2 city tiles. Gain 1 corruption. Increase your M€ production 4 steps.

Microprobing Technology.name: Microprobing Technology
Microprobing Technology.description: Requires 1 science tag. Gain 3 plants. Identify 2 underground resources. Claim 1 of them.

Geothermal Network.name: Geothermal Network
Geothermal Network.description: Requires 3 underground tokens. Increase your heat production 3 steps.

Global Audit.name: Global Audit
Global Audit.description: Every player with the lowest number of crime tags INCLUDING EVENTS gains 1 TR, if possible. Players with 0 crime tags gain 1 additional TR.

Patent Manipulation.name: Patent Manipulation
Patent Manipulation.description: RETURN 1 OF YOUR PLAYED GREEN OR BLUE CARDS TO YOUR HAND. IT MAY NOT BE A CARD THAT PLACES SPECIAL TILES OR RETURNS PLAYED CARDS TO YOUR HAND.

Cave City.name: Cave City
Cave City.description: Increase your steel production 1 step. Place a city in a NON-RESERVED SPACE WITH YOUR EXCAVATION MARKER, ignoring other placement restrictions

Underground Smuggling Ring.name: Underground Smuggling Ring
Underground Smuggling Ring.description: Requires you have 1 underground token. Gain 1 corruption and 2 of the same standard resource.

Deepmining.name: Deepmining
Deepmining.description: Excavate an underground resource that depicts steel or titanium ANYWHERE ON THE BOARD. Increase your production of that resource 1 step.

Tunneling Loophole.name: Tunneling Loophole
Tunneling Loophole.description: Requires 1 Earth tag. Until the end of this generation, you can excavate ignoring placement restrictions. Excavate 1 underground resource. Gain 1 corruption.

Orbital Laser Drill.name: Orbital Laser Drill
Orbital Laser Drill.description: Requires 2 science tags. Excavate 2 underground resources, IGNORING PLACEMENT RESTRICTIONS.

Excavator Leasing.name: Excavator Leasing
Excavator Leasing.description: excavate item symbol symbol megacredits item Effect: The excavate standard project costs 1 M€ less for all players. effect excavate item symbol megacredits item Effect: When any player excavates underground resources, you gain 1 M€ per excavation. effect root

Landfill.name: Landfill
Landfill.description: Increase your M€ production 1 step for each different TYPE of production you have at least 1 step of.

Corporate Blackmail.name: Corporate Blackmail
Corporate Blackmail.description: Requires 1 corruption. Target a player that has at least 3 corruption. That player pays you 10 M€ or 2 corruption - their choice.

Microgravimetry.name: Microgravimetry
Microgravimetry.description: energy item symbol -> identify item text item CLAIM symbol nbsp text item Action: Spend 2 energy identify 3 underground resources. Then claim 1 of them. effect root

Stem Field Subsidies.name: Stem Field Subsidies
Stem Field Subsidies.description: tag item science symbol resource item Data Effect: Whenever you play a science tag (including this), add 1 data to this card. effect resource item Data symbol -> identify item text item CLAIM symbol nbsp text item Action: Spend 2 resources here to identify 3 underground resources. Claim 1 of them. effect root

Titan Manufacturing Colony.name: Titan Manufacturing Colony
